changes: Total Eclipse: The additional effect "Increased enmity" has been added.
Prominence: The additional effect "Increased enmity" has been added.
Overpower: The additional effect "Increased enmity" has been added.
Mythril Tempest: The additional effect "Increased enmity" has been added.
Primal Rend: The effect duration of Primal Ruination Ready has been reduced from 30 to 20 seconds.
Primal Ruination: Potency has been increased from 740 to 780.
Unleash: The additional effect "Increased enmity" has been added.
Stalwart Soul: The additional effect "Increased enmity" has been added.
Shadowstride: The additional effect "Increased enmity" has been added.
Demon Slice: The additional effect "Increased enmity" has been added.
Demon Slaughter: The additional effect "Increased enmity" has been added.
Trajectory: The additional effect "Increased enmity" has been added.
True Strike: Potency has been increased from 290 to 300. Raptor's Fury potency has been increased from 440 to 500.

Snap Punch: Potency has been reduced from 300 to 270. Flank potency has been reduced from 360 to 330. Coeurl's Fury potency has been increased from 400 to 420. Flank Coeurl's Fury potency has been increased from 460 to 480.
Twin Snakes: Potency has been increased from 380 to 420. Increased potency effect of Raptor's Fury has been changed from 150 to 200.
Arm of the Destroyer: Potency has been increased from 100 to 110. Opo-opo Form potency has been increased from 110 to 120.
Demolish: Potency has been increased from 340 to 360. Rear potency has been increased from 400 to 420. Increased potency effect of Coeurl's Fury has been changed from 100 to 150.
Rockbreaker: Potency has been increased from 130 to 150.
Four-point Fury: Potency has been increased from 120 to 140.
Dragon Kick: Stacks of Opo-opo's Fury are now only granted while in Opo-opo Form.
Tornado Kick: Potency has been increased from 850 to 1,200.
Celestial Revolution: Potency has been increased from 450 to 600.
Flint Strike: Potency has been increased from 600 to 800.
Enlightenment: Potency has been increased from 170 to 200.
Shadow of the Destroyer: Potency has been increased from 110 to 120.
Rising Raptor: Potency has been increased from 330 to 340. Raptor's Fury potency has been increased from 480 to 540.

Pouncing Coeurl: Potency has been reduced from 340 to 310. Flank potency has been reduced from 400 to 370. Coeurl's Fury potency has been increased from 440 to 460. Flank Coeurl's Fury potency has been increased from 500 to 520.
Maximum stacks of Raptor's Fury have been reduced from 2 to 1.
Maximum stacks of Coeurl's Fury have been reduced from 3 to 2.
In accordance with this change, the display of the Beast Chakra Gauge has been adjusted.
Tendo Setsugekka: Recast time has been reduced from 3.2 to 2.5 seconds.
Tendo Kaeshi Setsugekka: Recast time has been reduced from 3.2 to 2.5 seconds.
Death Rattle: Range has been increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
Twinfang Bite: Range has been increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
Twinblood Bite: Range has been increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
First Legacy: Range has been increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
Second Legacy: Range has been increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
Third Legacy: Range has been increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
Fourth Legacy: Range has been increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
Umbral Soul: Now acquired at level 35 (previously level 76).
Manafication: Effect duration has been increased from 15 to 30 seconds.
Lightspeed: Now a charged action with a maximum of 2 charges. Recast time has been reduced from 90 to 60 seconds.
Astral Draw: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 55 seconds.
Umbral Draw: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 55 seconds.
Macrocosmos: Potency has been increased from 250 to 270.

new_content.name: Cenote Ja Ja Gural
new_content.description: A treasure hunt dungeon scheduled to be released in Patch 7.05.

new_content.name: A New Challenger Appears
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Directional Disregard
new_content.description: A new battle system mechanic where enemy target rings change shape to indicate that directional requirements do not need to be met.

new_content.name: Field Instances
new_content.description: A system where specific areas (Tuliyollal, Urqopacha, Kozama'uka) are split into multiple instances to reduce server congestion.

housing.name: Stone Partition
housing.description: The furnishing Stone Partition can now be dyed.

housing.name: It's Showtime! Orchestrion Roll
housing.description: Music roll for It's Showtime!. Use to add to your orchestrion list.

housing.name: Bee My Honey Orchestrion Roll
housing.description: Music roll for Bee My Honey. Use to add to your orchestrion list.

housing.name: Burning Souls Orchestrion Roll
housing.description: Music roll for Burning Souls. Use to add to your orchestrion list.

housing.name: Give It All Orchestrion Roll
housing.description: Music roll for Give It All. Use to add to your orchestrion list.

glamour.name: Light-heavy Holohelm
glamour.description: When activated, this electrope-powered device from the Arcadion projects a holographic helmet. Two helms can be traded for special headgear.

glamour.name: Light-heavy Holoarmor
glamour.description: When activated, this electrope-powered device from the Arcadion projects a holographic suit of armor. Four suits can be traded for special body gear.

glamour.name: Light-heavy Hologauntlets
glamour.description: When activated, this electrope-powered device from the Arcadion projects a holographic pair of gauntlets. Two pairs can be traded for special arm gear.

glamour.name: Light-heavy Holochausses
glamour.description: When activated, this electrope-powered device from the Arcadion projects a holographic pair of chausses. Four pairs can be traded for special leg gear.

glamour.name: Light-heavy Hologreaves
glamour.description: When activated, this electrope-powered device from the Arcadion projects a holographic pair of greaves. Two pairs can be traded for special foot gear.

glamour.name: Light-heavy Holoearring
glamour.description: When activated, this electrope-powered device from the Arcadion projects a holographic earring. One earring can be traded for a special accessory.
